metadata.title: Reddit Post Navigation and Comment Interaction
metadata.description: A test scenario verifying the loading of the Reddit homepage, navigation to a specific post, scrolling through comments with media content, expanding nested reply threads, viewing a single comment thread, and returning to the main post.

steps.description: Navigate to https://reddit.com and wait for the homepage to load.
Verify the Reddit homepage is loaded and the post 'Tens of thousands of people...' is visible.
Click on the post titled 'Tens of thousands of people have taken the streets of Minneapolis...'.
Verify the post detail page has loaded with the main image visible.
Scroll down to the comments section until the comment with the 'IMAGINE HATING IMMIGRANTS' image is visible.
Verify the comment containing the 'IMAGINE HATING IMMIGRANTS' image is displayed.
Scroll down to the comment containing the 'BITCHES' text image.
Verify the comment with the 'BITCHES' image is visible.
Scroll down further to find the comment with the skeleton meme image.
Verify the comment with the skeleton meme image is visible.
Scroll down to the comment thread starting with 'We stand with Minnesota's heroes!!'.
Verify the comment 'We stand with Minnesota's heroes!!' is visible.
Scroll down to the comment with the 'What Trump Derangement Syndrome really looks like' image.
Verify the comment with the Trump meme image is visible.
Scroll down to the comment thread by user 'JimsVanLife' and 'Darth-Yoda-1066'.
Verify the 'JimsVanLife' and 'Darth-Yoda-1066' comment thread is visible.
Scroll down to the comment by 'Frequent_Prize'.
Verify the comment by 'Frequent_Prize' regarding conservatives is visible.
Scroll back up to the 'Darth-Yoda-1066' comment to prepare for expanding replies.
Verify the 'Darth-Yoda-1066' comment and the '15 more replies' (or similar) button are visible.
Click the expansion button (e.g., '15 more replies' or plus icon) under 'Darth-Yoda-1066' to view nested comments.
Verify the nested replies, including comments by 'LamuCalifornia' and 'Underwater_Grilling', are now visible.
Click on the timestamp or link for the 'Underwater_Grilling' comment to view the single comment thread.
Verify the view has changed to 'Single comment thread' focusing on 'Underwater_Grilling'.
Click 'See full discussion' or navigate back to the main post page.
Verify the browser has returned to the main post page.
Final verification that the main post page content is fully visible.
